# llms.txt
# AI-Readable Information about Nicolas (Netoun)

## About
Nicolas is a Full Stack Engineer and Creative Developer based in Nantes, France.
Currently working at Lonestone as a Software Engineer.

## Contact & Links
- Website: https://www.netoun.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/netoun
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/nicolas-garnier
- Location: Nantes, France

## Expertise
### Frontend Development
- React, TypeScript, Next.js
- React Router, Vanilla Extract, Tailwind CSS
- React Aria, shadcn/ui
- anime.js, Motion

### Backend Development
- NestJS, Node.js
- PostgreSQL, Drizzle, MikroORM
- Bun, Elysia

### Real-time Systems
- WebSockets, Server-Sent Events (SSE)
- Queues, Streaming

### Creative & Game Development
- Three.js, Canvas 2D, WebGL
- Rust, Bevy, WebGPU

### Infrastructure
- Docker, Cloudflare
- Keycloak, Ansible

## Projects
### Treashunt
- URL: https://github.com/Netoun/treashunt
- Description: Personal project - Adventure design platform with exciting challenges
- Tech: React, Drizzle, Cloudflare, Bun, Elysia

### Game NTNH
- URL: https://game-ntnh.netoun.com/
- Description: Experimental procedural game built with Rust and Bevy
- Tech: Rust, Bevy, WebGPU

### Procedural Maps
- URL: https://r-noise-map.vercel.app/
- Description: Random map generation with procedural algorithms
- Tech: TypeScript, React, Three.js, Canvas

### Nzoth
- URL: https://github.com/lonestone/nzoth
- Description: NestJS utilities for building RESTful APIs with filtering, pagination, sorting, and Zod validation
- Tech: TypeScript, NestJS, Zod

### Lonestone Boilerplate
- URL: https://github.com/lonestone/lonestone-boilerplate
- Description: Starter kit for full-stack web apps, SaaS and websites
- Tech: TypeScript, NestJS, React, Monorepo

- Role: Software Developer
